blocks.text: Åberg leads PLAYERS, Hovland five back — Anfield title showdown at 17:30
Arsenal hammered Everton 2-0 yesterday; Man City could only draw 1-1 at West Ham. The table is shifting at the top — Liverpool's response at Anfield this afternoon carries real weight.

blocks.label: 🏆 Champions League Tuesday — also
items: ⚽ Tue 21:00 — Man City vs Real Madrid — Haaland against the European kings, all square
⚽ Tue 21:00 — Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen — level on aggregate at the Emirates
⚽ Tue 21:00 — Chelsea vs PSG — Stamford Bridge, quarter-final spot on the line
